projects.note: Client requested a new 'Billboard Split' treatment (7/8); team pulled in an AI creative (Diego Triana) to help execute it, and a live thread with technical discussion (rotoscoping approach, asset repository, IR timeline) continued into the early hours of 7/10 — real, active work ongoing.

Creative Delivery 2 was sent to the customer 7/9 evening (per Asana project notes, roughly on the planned CD2/Feedback-2 timeline); Asana's 'V2 Delivery' and 'Client Feedback Due - V2' tasks still show incomplete/overdue but Slack confirms the real delivery happened — checkbox-hygiene lag. Team now awaits Strava's round-2 feedback before CD3, due 7/13 per Asana.
F1 (Creative Delivery 3 + Google exports) sent to customer 7/9 evening; Asana shows Client Approval Due - F1 on 7/13 — on schedule, not stalled.
KV Presentation V2 formally sent to customer review 7/7, capping a week of continuous active design work (Figma iterations 7/1-7/7); awaiting response, no client reply yet as of 7/9.

New draft delivered 7/3 after real work 6/29-7/3; customer confirmed 7/7 he's happy with the initial setup and reviewing in detail before debriefing Superside. Watch closely — this project has a history of 2.5-month stalls hidden behind similar vague 'awaiting feedback' notes.

CD3 sent to customer 7/7 evening; as of 7/9 team is still chasing the client for confirmation on which World Cup / Runner→Lifter posts to move into design — Claire flagged urgency since the World Cup final is 7/19. Part of a larger 5-week/14-carousel evergreen workstream.

Following the 7/8 client call, team is deep in IR1 image-by-image iteration; Windy posted a detailed shot-by-shot recap (7/9 22:33) with several images still needing edits (ethnicity, color tone, seatbelt) — real, active back-and-forth continuing daily.

projects.note: Final assets sent for customer review 6/18; client cited layoffs on 6/23 and never followed up despite an internal check-in 6/30 — no further Slack activity since, now ~3 weeks of client silence.

projects.display_name: Lucid Motors — General Awareness Paid Ads
projects.note: Assets sent for customer review 6/19; client cited layoffs 6/23 and promised feedback by EOW but never delivered. Chris checked in again 7/6 ('i'm assuming we havent heard back?') and Stefany confirmed 'Not yet' — client silence continuing, now ~2.5 weeks.
Only two messages ever in this channel (4/17 and 6/5), both confirming nothing is actionable pending the customer's brief — no scoping or drafts have occurred.

No real work or client contact since D1 was sent 2026-02-20 (~5 months); only activity since is internal PTO/on-hold announcements, most recently Monise's 6/30 OOO note reconfirming the project is paused until mid-late July.
